accounting-office-p: Mandatory if the client is the public administration. You can leave the fields name, address, postal code, city and province blank to use those of the client.
autofirma-explanation: You can sign the invoice using the auto-signature application. If you have it installed on your PC or mac. It is the easiest way to sign with your certificate.
certificate-password-required: The password of the certificate is required to be able to sign the invoice
certificate-required: You must select a certificate to be able to sign the invoice
facturae-delete-before: Cannot delete the invoice as it has already been signed with facturae
fill-facturae: Fill in this form to generate the electronic invoice. Select the bank account where to receive the payment and the file number, if necessary.
gen-only-xml-p: If you want to generate only the XML, without signing, press the button generate XML.
import-factura-e-p: If your supplier has sent you an invoice in e-invoice format, you can import that file from here, or connect to your email and import it directly.
mails-factura-e-p: Here you can see all the emails you have received that contain an facturae file. Click on the file to import it automatically.
managing-body-p: Mandatory if the client is the public administration. You can leave the fields name, address, postal code, city and province in blank to use those of the client.
processing-unit-p: Mandatory if the client is the public administration. You can leave the fields name, address, postal code, city and province in blank to use those of the client.
proposing-body-p: You can leave the fields name, address, postal code, city and province in blank to use those of the client.
sign-invoice-p: Select your Treasury certificate, a file with a p12 or pfx extension, type the password and press the continue button to generate and sign the electronic invoice.
